title: Transactional status snapshot and semantic projection
goal: Build one coherent daemon-owned run snapshot and move lifecycle, gate, attention, and operator-action interpretation fully behind the server projection boundary.
acceptance: Use behavioral TDD: first add snapshot consistency/error-visibility tests and Rust/renderer parity tests that fail under mixed revisions or client-side semantic interpretation, then implement.

RunReadModelBuilder obtains run, slices, attempts, questions, replans, incidents, events, economics, terminalization, and merge/admission state from one SQLite read transaction/revision. Required read failures are surfaced explicitly and never converted into empty attention lists.

Artifact and Git-derived fields used by status are either durably indexed into that transaction, read against a recorded revision/commit with explicit freshness metadata, or reported unavailable; a response cannot silently combine unrelated revisions.

Daemon-owned StatusFeed and typed projection blocks own terminal/lifecycle interpretation, primary reason, gate/repair summaries, worker activity, attention priority, and exact operator action commands.

CLI, watch, monitor, cockpit, and Node extension are painters over the versioned projection. They do not parse raw events, infer terminal semantics, synthesize gate state, or independently decide which operator command is valid.
Terminal run summaries, live/latest status, handoff/report readiness, and terminal notifications consume the same read model with explicit pre-advertisement overrides where required.
Snapshot schema is backward-compatible or versioned additively, includes freshness/error metadata, and preserves daemon-state authority independent of Herdr/Pi availability.
Tests force concurrent writes during snapshot construction, question-read failure, missing/corrupt artifacts, Git movement, blocked/failed/completed/cancelled states, and Rust/Node painter parity.
must_ask_if: Status correctness would depend on locking the entire workflow manager for all reads.
A renderer must retain semantic logic because the server projection lacks a field; add/version the field instead.
Required attention data would be hidden on read failure.
The implementation would make daemon state depend on Pi/Herdr UI state.
